transcript: Speaker A (Raita): बिर्याणी पप्पा म्हणालेत ज्या दिवशी तू English मध्ये बोलशील त्या दिवशी लग्नाची चर्चा करू. [Biryani, Papa said the day you speak in English, we will discuss marriage.] Speaker B (Biryani): बस इतकंच? [Just that?] Speaker A (Raita): तुला तर "Thank you" बोलतानाही घाम येतो. [You even sweat while saying "Thank you".] Speaker B (Biryani): यायचा, आता नाही. उद्या भेटव तुझ्या पप्पांना. [Used to, not anymore. Introduce me to your Papa tomorrow.] Speaker C (Biryani Papa): तर तू आहेस बिर्याणी, ज्याला माझ्या मुली रायताशी लग्न करायचं आहे? काय आहे तुझी औकात? [So you are Biryani, who wants to marry my daughter Raita? What is your status?] Speaker B (Biryani): Uncle, with all due respect, I understand your concern but I will never disappoint you and I will always keep Raita happy. Speaker C (Biryani Papa): बिर्याणी, तू आणि English? मागच्या वेळी तर "हो अंकल" पेक्षा जास्त काही बोलूच शकला नाहीस. [Biryani, you and English? Last time you couldn't say anything more than "Yes Uncle".] Speaker B (Biryani): हो अंकल... मागच्या वेळी तुम्ही विचारलं होतं "What are your intentions?" आणि मी काहीच बोलू शकलो नाही. तेव्हा रायता रडत मला म्हणाली "पप्पांना वाटतं तुला English येतच नाही." त्याच रात्री मी MySivi App install केलं आणि ₹1 चा trial घेतला. मग रोज 15 मिनिट AI teacher सोबत English बोलायची practice करायला लागलो. AI माझ्या grammar च्या चुका लगेच सुधारायची, pronunciation improve करायची आणि real conversations ची practice द्यायची. हळूहळू माझा confidence वाढायला लागला. [Yes Uncle... last time you asked "What are your intentions?" and I couldn't say anything. Then Raita crying told me "Papa thinks you don't know English at all." That same night I installed MySivi App and took the ₹1 trial. Then every day for 15 minutes I started practicing speaking English with the AI teacher. AI would immediately correct my grammar mistakes, improve pronunciation, and give practice of real conversations. Slowly my confidence started to grow.] Speaker A (Raita): जर बिर्याणी English शिकू शकते, तर तुम्हीही नक्की शिकू शकता. म्हणून आजच MySivi App download करा आणि फक्त ₹1 च्या trial मध्ये तुमची English speaking journey सुरू करा. [If Biryani can learn English, then you too can definitely learn. So download MySivi App today and start your English speaking journey in just a ₹1 trial.]
on_screen_text: बिर्याणी पप्पा [Biryani Papa] म्हणालेत [said] ज्या दिवशी तू [the day you] English मध्ये [in English] बोलशील [will speak] त्या दिवशी लग्नाची [that day marriage] चर्चा करू [will discuss] बस इतकंच [just that] तुला तर "Thank you" [you even "Thank you"] बोलतानाही घाम येतो [sweat while saying] यायचा [used to] आता नाही [not now] उद्या भेटव [meet tomorrow] पप्पांना [to Papa] तर तू आहेस बिर्याणी [so you are Biryani] ज्याला माझ्या [who my] मुली रायताशी [daughter Raita] लग्न करायचं आहे [wants to marry] काय आहे तुझी औकात [what is your status] with all due respect I understand your concern but I will never disappoint you and I will always keep Raita happy बिर्याणी तू आणि [Biryani you and] English मागच्या वेळी [last time] तर "हो अंकल" पेक्षा [than "Yes Uncle"] जास्त काही बोलूच [more anything speak] शकला नाहीस [could not] हो अंकल... मागच्या [Yes Uncle... last] वेळी तुम्ही विचारलं [time you asked] होतं "What are [was "What are] your intentions?" आणि मी काहीच बोलू [and I nothing speak] शकलो नाही [could not] तेव्हा रायता [then Raita] रडत मला म्हणाली [crying told me] "पप्पांना वाटतं [Papa thinks] तुला English [you English] येतच नाही." [don't know at all] त्याच [that] रात्री मी MySivi [night I MySivi] App install केलं [App installed] आणि ₹1 चा trial [and ₹1 trial] घेतला [took] मग रोज [then daily] 15 मिनिट [15 minutes] AI teacher सोबत [with AI teacher] English बोलायची [English speaking] practice करायला [practice to do] लागलो [started] AI माझ्या grammar [AI my grammar] च्या चुका लगेच [mistakes immediately] सुधारायची [would correct] pronunciation improve करायची [improve would do] आणि real conversations [and real conversations] ची practice द्यायची [practice would give] हळूहळू माझा [slowly my] confidence वाढायला लागला [started to grow] जर बिर्याणी [if Biryani] English शिकू शकते [can learn] तर तुम्हीही नक्की [then you too definitely] शिकू शकता [can learn] म्हणून आजच MySivi [so today itself MySivi] App download [App download] करा आणि फक्त [do and only] ₹1 [₹1] च्या trial मध्ये [in trial] तुमची English [your English] speaking journey [speaking journey] सुरू करा [start] मात्र ₹1 [Only ₹1] Install Now
summary: An animated Marathi ad featuring food characters where Biryani must learn English to marry Raita. He overcomes his embarrassment by practicing 15 minutes daily with MySivi's AI teacher, which corrects his grammar and pronunciation. The ad promotes a 1-rupee trial to start learning English.
